basis: the export must pass through more than one human reviewer role before release
approval order and rejection handling must be explicit
the round must emit a concrete export payload and bundle
every reviewer must inspect the same serialized candidate rather than a drifting rewrite

reasons: The round contains a multi-reviewer approval chain rather than one simple review gate.
Review order, rejection paths, and final release authority must be explicit.
The round must emit one stable export payload for all reviewers to inspect.
Representation must package the payload consistently without owning release authority.

governance_and_feedback_mode.why: multi-reviewer topology, review order, and rejection handling must be explicit before export release

representation_and_serialization_mode.if_missing: loop back to semantic_clarification or branch_plan_generation depending on the missing export target
representation_and_serialization_mode.why: all reviewers must inspect one stable payload rather than a semantically drifting export

mode_precedence.precedence_basis: review topology and release eligibility outrank export release timing
mode_precedence.note: Representation may prepare the shared payload, but governance decides who must review it, in what order, and when release is allowed.

mode_precedence.precedence_basis: representation cannot redefine the semantics being exported
mode_precedence.note: Representation stays downstream-only over semantic meaning.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Expose one concrete export payload to the multi-reviewer approval chain.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Different reviewers may end up approving different payload revisions.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Package the shared payload and related visibility targets so every reviewer inspects the same candidate set.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Reviewer visibility may drift across approval steps.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Define review topology, approval order, and required artifact visibility before release.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Representation may publish or package outputs without knowing which review gates still apply.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Define what happens when one reviewer rejects, edits, or requests regeneration of the payload.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Serialization may freeze an export that governance has sent back for revision.

interaction_notes.active_when: one serialized export candidate must pass through multiple human review roles before release
interaction_notes.note: Keep payload construction separate from approval topology and final release authority.

interaction_notes.active_when: a reviewer may reject or request edits after an earlier reviewer has already approved
interaction_notes.note: Use override-policy.json to define whether the payload is regenerated, partially re-reviewed, or fully re-reviewed.
